name_cn:
Genuine leather
Loewe Shell Tote series handbag Large model 4201
Made of denim and cowhide, its sturdy base and soft crescent body, paired with Anagram charm and unique knotted strap, are stylish, generous, and spacious
Z Less than a penny here
Dimensions 49-34-16🔔 Very stylish! The bag is very light, a must-have for outings!
